name: Sprigatito
description: The sweet scent its body gives off mesmerizes those around it. The scent grows stronger when this Pokémon is in the sun.

name: Floragato
description: The hardness of Floragato's fur depends on the Pokémon's mood. When Floragato is prepared to battle, its fur becomes pointed and needle sharp.

attacks.name: Flower Trick
attacks.effect: Choose a spot from among your opponent's Active Spot and Bench. At the end of your opponent's next turn, do 70 damage to the Pokémon in the spot you chose.

name: Tarountula
description: The thread it secretes from its rear is as strong as wire. The secret behind the thread's strength is the topic of ongoing research.

name: Spidops
description: Spidops covers its territory in tough, sticky threads to set up traps for intruders.

attacks.name: Bind Down
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

name: Nymble
description: It's highly skilled at a fighting style in which it uses its jumping capabilities to dodge incoming attacks while also dealing damage to opponents.

attacks.name: U-turn
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Smoliv
description: It protects itself from enemies by emitting oil from the fruit on its head. This oil is bitter and astringent enough to make someone flinch.

attacks.name: Absorb
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

name: Dolliv
description: Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone.

name: Arboliva
description: This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon.

abilities.name: Extra Heal
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may heal 60 damage from 1 of your Pokémon ex that has any Energy attached. If you do, discard a random Energy from that Pokémon.

name: Bramblin
description: Not even Bramblin knows where it is headed as it tumbles across the wilderness, blown by the wind. It loathes getting wet.

name: Brambleghast
description: Brambleghast wanders around arid regions. On rare occasions, mass outbreaks of these Pokémon will bury an entire town.

attacks.name: Continuous Tumble
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 60 damage for each heads.

name: Capsakid
description: Traditional Paldean dishes can be extremely spicy because they include the shed front teeth of Capsakid among their ingredients.

name: Scovillain
description: The green head has turned vicious due to the spicy chemicals stimulating its brain. Once it goes on a rampage, there is no stopping it.

attacks.name: Red-Hot Headbutt
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Grass or Metal Pokémon, this attack does 40 more damage.

name: Rellor
description: It rolls its mud ball around while the energy it needs for evolution matures. Eventually the time comes for it to evolve.

attacks.name: Ball Roll
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

name: Wo-Chien
description: It drains the life-force from vegetation, causing nearby forests to instantly wither and fields to turn barren.

attacks.name: Binding Greed
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon cost {C}{C} more.

name: Fuecoco
description: Its flame sac is small, so energy is always leaking out. This energy is released from the dent atop Fuecoco's head and flickers to and fro.

attacks.name: Cheerful Singing
attacks.effect: Put 1 random Basic Pokémon from your deck onto your Bench.

name: Crocalor
description: The valve in Crocalor's flame sac is closely connected to its vocal cords. This Pokémon utters a guttural cry as it spews flames every which way.

name: Skeledirge
description: Skeledirge's gentle singing soothes the souls of all that hear it. It burns its enemies to a crisp with flames of over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit.

abilities.name: Passionate Voice
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may discard 1 Fire Energy from this Pokémon in order to use this Ability. During this turn, attacks used by your Fire Pokémon do +50 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Charcadet
description: Its firepower increases when it fights, reaching over 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit. It likes berries that are rich in fat.

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.effect: This Pokémon takes –30 damage from attacks.

attacks.name: Armor Cannon
attacks.effect: Discard a {R} Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Chi-Yu
description: The envy accumulated within curved beads that sparked multiple conflicts has clad itself in fire and become a Pokémon.

attacks.name: Megafire of Envy
attacks.effect: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 60 more damage.

name: Quaxly
description: Its strong legs let it easily swim around in even fast-flowing rivers. It likes to keep things tidy and is prone to overthinking things.

attacks.name: Splashing Dodge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

name: Quaxwell
description: The hardworking Quaxwell observes people and Pokémon from various regions and incorporates their movements into its own dance routines.

attacks.name: Splashing Turn
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Quaquaval
description: Dancing in ways that evoke far-away places, this Pokémon mesmerizes all that see it. Flourishes of its decorative water feathers slice into its foes.

abilities.name: Torrent
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon's remaining HP is 50 or less, attacks used by this Pokémon do +60 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Wiglett
description: Though it looks like Diglett, Wiglett is an entirely different species. The resemblance seems to be a coincidental result of environmental adaptation.

name: Wugtrio
description: A variety of fish Pokémon, Wugtrio was once considered to be a regional form of Dugtrio.

attacks.name: Triple Whip
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

name: Finizen
description: Its water ring is made from seawater mixed with a sticky fluid that Finizen secretes from its blowhole.

name: Palafin
description: This hero of the ocean swims at a speed of 50 knots and saves drowning people and Pokémon.

attacks.name: Jet Punch
attacks.effect: This attack also does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Cetoddle
description: It lives in frigid regions in pods of five or so individuals. It loves the minerals found in snow and ice.

name: Cetitan
description: Ice energy builds up in the horn on its upper jaw, causing the horn to reach cryogenic temperatures that freeze its surroundings.

attacks.name: Ice Punch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Veluza
description: Veluza has excellent regenerative capabilities. It sheds spare flesh from its body to boost its agility, then charges at its prey.

attacks.name: Shedding Spiral
attacks.effect: If you have no cards in your deck, this attack can be used for 1 Water Energy.

name: Dondozo
description: It treats Tatsugiri like its boss and follows it loyally. Though powerful, Dondozo is apparently not very smart.

attacks.name: Giga Impact
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Tatsugiri
description: Tatsugiri is an extremely cunning Pokémon. It feigns weakness to lure in prey, then orders its partner to attack.

attacks.name: Rally Back
attacks.effect: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 60 more damage.

name: Frigibax
description: This Pokémon lives in forests and craggy areas. Using the power of its dorsal fin, it cools the inside of its nest like a refrigerator.

name: Arctibax
description: It attacks with the blade of its frozen dorsal fin by doing a front flip in the air. Arctibax’s strong back and legs allow it to pull off this technique.

name: Baxcalibur
description: It launches itself into battle by flipping upside down and spewing frigid air from its mouth. It finishes opponents off with its dorsal blade.

abilities.name: Ice Maker
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may take a Water Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to the Water Pokémon in the Active Spot.

attacks.name: Diving Icicles
attacks.effect: Discard all Water Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 130 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

name: Pawmi
description: The pads of its paws are electricity-discharging organs. Pawmi fires electricity from its forepaws while standing unsteadily on its hind legs.

attacks.name: Random Spark
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

name: Pawmo
description: Pawmo uses a unique fighting technique in which it uses its forepaws to strike foes and zap them with electricity from its paw pads simultaneously.

name: Pawmot
description: Pawmot's fluffy fur acts as a battery. It can store the same amount of electricity as an electric car.

attacks.name: Thunder Blast
attacks.effect: Discard a Lightning Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Tadbulb
description: It floats using the electricity stored in its body. When thunderclouds are around, Tadbulb will float higher off the ground.

attacks.name: High-Voltage Cannon
attacks.effect: If you have 4 or more Lightning Energy in play, this attack does 70 more damage.

name: Wattrel
description: These Pokémon make their nests on coastal cliffs. The nests have a strange, crackling texture, and they're a popular delicacy.

name: Kilowattrel
description: It uses its throat sac to store electricity generated by its wings. There's hardly any oil in its feathers, so it is a poor swimmer.

name: Miraidon
description: This seems to be the Iron Serpent mentioned in an old book. The Iron Serpent is said to have turned the land to ash with its lightning.

attacks.name: Lightning Laser
attacks.effect: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

name: Fidough
description: The yeast in Fidough's breath is useful for cooking, so this Pokémon has been protected by people since long ago.

name: Dachsbun
description: The pleasant aroma that emanates from this Pokémon's body helps wheat grow, so Dachsbun has been treasured by farming villages.

attacks.name: Play Rough
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 more damage.

name: Ceruledge
description: An old set of armor steeped in grudges caused this Pokémon's evolution. Ceruledge cuts its enemies to pieces without mercy.

attacks.name: Fighting Sword
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 70 more damage.

name: Rabsca
description: An infant sleeps inside the ball. Rabsca rolls the ball soothingly with its legs to ensure the infant sleeps comfortably.

attacks.name: Psybeam
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Flittle
description: It spends its time running around wastelands. If anyone steals its beloved berries, it will chase them down and exact its revenge.

name: Espathra
description: It emits psychic power from the gaps between its multicolored frills and sprints at speeds greater than 120 mph.

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Greavard
description: This friendly Pokémon doesn't like being alone. Pay it even the slightest bit of attention, and it will follow you forever.

attacks.name: Soul Shot
attacks.effect: Discard a card from your hand. If you can't, this attack does nothing.

name: Houndstone
description: A lovingly mourned Pokémon was reborn as Houndstone. It doesn't like anyone touching the protuberance atop its head.

attacks.name: Last Respects
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Psychic Pokémon in your discard pile.

name: Gimmighoul
description: It lives inside an old treasure chest. Sometimes it gets left in shop corners since no one realizes it’s actually a Pokémon.

attacks.name: Continuous Coin Toss
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

name: Mankey
description: It is extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment, then thrashing away the next instant.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.

name: Primeape
description: Some researchers theorize that Primeape remains angry even when inside a Poké Ball.

attacks.name: Rage
attacks.effect: This attack does more damage equal to the damage this Pokémon has on it.

name: Annihilape
description: It imbues its fists with the power of the rage that it kept hidden in its heart. Opponents struck by these imbued fists will be shattered to their core.

attacks.name: Dynamite Punch
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.

name: Paldean Tauros
description: This kind of Tauros, known as the Combat Breed, is distinguished by its thick, powerful muscles and its fierce disposition.

name: Toedscool
description: Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious.

name: Toedscruel
description: It coils its 10 tentacles around prey and sucks out their nutrients, causing the prey pain. The folds along the rim of its head are a popular delicacy.

attacks.name: Stun Spore
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Klawf
description: This Pokémon lives on sheer cliffs. It sidesteps opponents’ attacks, then lunges for their weak spots with its claws.

attacks.name: Adrenaline Hammer
attacks.effect: This Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Ting-Lu
description: It slowly brings its exceedingly heavy head down upon the ground, splitting the earth open with huge fissures that run over 160 feet deep.

attacks.name: Arrogant Impact
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon's remaining HP is 60 or less, this attack does nothing.

name: Koraidon
description: This Pokémon resembles Cyclizar, but it is far burlier and more ferocious. Nothing is known about its ecology or other features.

attacks.name: Rampaging Fang
attacks.effect: Discard 2 {R} Energy from this Pokémon.

name: Paldean Wooper
description: It's dangerous for Wooper to travel alone. They line up in groups of three or four and help each other as they walk around the wetlands.

name: Paldean Clodsire
description: It lives at the bottom of ponds and swamps. It will carry Wooper on its back and ferry them across water from one shore to the other.

attacks.name: Muddy Hammer
attacks.effect: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

name: Lokix
description: It uses its normally folded third set of legs when in Showdown Mode. This places a huge burden on its body, so it can't stay in this mode for long.

attacks.name: Rocket Jump
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Maschiff
description: Its well-developed jaw and fangs are strong enough to crunch through boulders, and its thick fat makes for an excellent defense.

name: Mabosstiff
description: Mabosstiff loves playing with children. Though usually gentle, it takes on an intimidating look when protecting its family.

attacks.name: Wild Tackle
attacks.effect: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.

name: Shroodle
description: To keep enemies away from its territory, it paints markings around its nest using a poisonous liquid that has an acrid odor.

name: Grafaiai
description: Each Grafaiai paints its own individual pattern, and it will paint that same pattern over and over again throughout its life.

attacks.name: Colorful Attack
attacks.effect: If your Pokémon in play have 3 or more different types of Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.

name: Bombirdier
description: Bombirdier uses the apron on its chest to bundle up food, which it carries back to its nest. It enjoys dropping things that make loud noises.

attacks.name: Fly
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

name: Tinkatink
description: This Pokémon pounds iron scraps together to make a hammer. It will remake the hammer again and again until it's satisfied with the result.

name: Tinkatuff
description: These Pokémon make their homes in piles of scrap metal. They test the strength of each other's hammers by smashing them together.

name: Tinkaton
description: The hammer tops 220 pounds, yet it gets swung around easily by Tinkaton as it steals whatever it pleases and carries its plunder back home.

attacks.name: Gigaton Hammer
attacks.effect: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Gigaton Hammer.

name: Varoom
description: The steel section is Varoom's actual body. This Pokémon clings to rocks and converts the minerals within into energy to fuel its activities.

name: Revavroom
description: Revavroom viciously threatens others with the sound of its exhaust. It sticks its tongue out from its cylindrical mouth and sprays toxic fluids.

attacks.name: Poison Gas
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Orthworm
description: This Pokémon lives in arid deserts. It maintains its metal body by consuming iron from the soil.

attacks.name: Iron Supply
attacks.effect: Take a Metal Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Spending Rush
attacks.effect: 1 of your opponent's Pokémon is chosen at random for each Metal Energy attached to this Pokémon. For each time a Pokémon was chosen, do 40 damage to it.

name: Lechonk
description: This Pokémon spurns all but the finest of foods. Its body gives off an herblike scent that bug Pokémon detest.

name: Oinkologne
description: It entrances female Pokémon with the sweet, alluring scent that wafts from all over its body.

attacks.name: Leg Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, during your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

name: Tandemaus
description: The pair sticks together no matter what. They split any food they find exactly in half and then eat it together.

attacks.name: Double Hit
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

name: Maushold
description: The little one just appeared one day. They all live together like a family, but the relationship between the three is still unclear.

attacks.name: Triple Gnawing
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Squawkabilly
description: Green-feathered flocks hold the most sway. When they're out searching for food in the mornings and evenings, it gets very noisy.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

name: Cyclizar
description: It can sprint at over 70 mph while carrying a human. The rider's body heat warms Cyclizar's back and lifts the Pokémon's spirit.

attacks.name: Driving Buddy
attacks.effect: If you played a Supporter card from your hand during this turn, this attack does 60 more damage.

name: Flamigo
description: Thanks to a behavior of theirs known as “synchronizing,” an entire flock of these Pokémon can attack simultaneously in perfect harmony.

name: Electric Generator
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, take a Lightning Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Lightning Pokémon.

name: Big Air Balloon
effect: The Stage 2 Pokémon this card is attached to has no Retreat Cost.

name: Team Star Grunt
effect: Discard a random Energy from among the Energy attached to all of your opponent's Pokémon that have an Ability.

name: Iono
effect: Each player shuffles the cards in their hand into their deck, then draws that many cards.

name: Nemona
effect: During this turn, attacks used by your Pawmot do +80 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon ex.

name: Arven
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, put a random Item card from your deck into your hand. If tails, put a random Pokémon Tool card from your deck into your hand.

name: Penny
effect: Look at a random Supporter card that's not Penny from your opponent's deck and shuffle it back into their deck. Use the effect of that card as the effect of this card.

name: Mesagoza
effect: Once during each player's turn, that player may flip a coin. If heads, that player puts a random Pokémon from their deck into their hand. You may play only 1 Stadium card during your turn. Put it next to the Active Spot, and discard it if another Stadium comes into play. A Stadium with the same name can't be played.

name: Fuecoco
description: Its flame sac is small, so energy is always leaking out. This energy is released from the dent atop Fuecoco's head and flickers to and fro.

attacks.name: Cheerful Singing
attacks.effect: Put 1 random Basic Pokémon from your deck onto your Bench.

name: Floragato
description: The hardness of Floragato's fur depends on the Pokémon's mood. When Floragato is prepared to battle, its fur becomes pointed and needle sharp.

name: Meowscarada
description: This Pokémon uses the reflective fur lining its cape to camouflage the stem of its flower, creating the illusion that the flower is floating.

attacks.name: Fighting Claws
attacks.effect: If your opponent’s Active Pokémon is a Pokémon {ex}, this attack does 70 more damage.

name: Pawmi

attacks.effect: Discard a Lightning Energy from this Pokémon.

attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.

name: Tinkatuff
description: These Pokémon make their homes in piles of scrap metal. They test the strength of each other's hammers by smashing them together.

name: Gholdengo
description: Its body seems to be made up of 1,000 coins. This Pokémon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody.

attacks.name: Scintillating Surfing
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each {M} Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.

abilities.name: Legendary Pulse
abilities.effect: At the end of your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, draw a card.

attacks.name: Blazing Beatdown
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra {R} Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.

abilities.name: Legendary Pulse
abilities.effect: At the end of your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, draw a card.

attacks.name: Crystal Waltz
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage for each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).

abilities.name: Legendary Pulse
abilities.effect: At the end of your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, draw a card.

attacks.name: Voltaic Bullet
attacks.effect: This attack also does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Terrific Thumping
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 80 more damage.

name: Baxcalibur
description: It launches itself into battle by flipping upside down and spewing frigid air from its mouth. It finishes opponents off with its dorsal blade.

abilities.name: Ice Maker
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, you may take a Water Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to the Water Pokémon in the Active Spot.

name: Electric Generator
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, take a Lightning Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Lightning Pokémon.
